Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing expert Jim Crowley teaches us how to design and build our own rigs for every freshwater species.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin takes viewers to the top destinations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Stoked on Fishing crew takes you to the most amazing locations for some epic saltwater action.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim Crowley interviews top anglers and industry insiders from around the world of angling.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows the effectiveness of swim jigs for both largemouth and smallmouth bass in extremely clear water
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Swim Jiggin' It
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Thunder Bay Bass
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Thunder Bay Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week we find everyones favorite fish...sheephead. but were going out in search of Giants!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In the thrilling Season 7 finale, Paul & Perry and the team venture deep into Northern Ontario, using a Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake with high hopes for walleye. However, the day takes a surprising turn as Northern Pike steal the show with their spirited action. The adventure doesn’t end there—a bonus portage into another lake offers a chance to explore uncharted waters. It’s a fitting conclusion to a season filled with the unexpected and unforgettable.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Remote Escapes: Pike Frenzy and Hidden Lake Explorations
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we head to Frederick House Lake in Connaught, Ontario, just east of Timmins. With a narrow window of opportunity before the weather closes in, we reel in some fantastic walleye, sauger, and other exciting species. It's all about adapting to the elements and making the most of the moment!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Storm’s Edge Success: Fishing Frederick House Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shea McIntee and the crew head down to East Cape, also know as the gem of Baja Mexico and stay at Hotel Buena Vista Beach Resort for the fifth year in a row. After checking in, we head off for some epic tuna and marlin fishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing — Hot Bite in Baja
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: As fall grips Northern Ontario, unpredictable weather makes fishing a true test of patience and perseverance. Paul is joined by young angler Matthew, who’s finishing university and weighing the decision to stay in the North. Facing extreme cold on their first attempt, the duo regroup and return a few days later to a new lake, chasing walleye and capturing the stunning wilderness that makes Northern Ontario a fall angler’s paradise.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Fall Walleye Challenge

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe Father Son Challenge Part 1
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Father Son Challenge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Redfish Lodge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Young Female Anglers participate in the regional Angler Young Angler Tournament
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hook n' Look returns to Carter's Lake with guide, Louie Bartenfield. He and host, Kim Stricker employ TG Finesse Football Jigs along steep banks and the endeavor pays off with some southern bling!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Walleye fishing early spring walleye in the Ivanhoe River.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: There is no pill, no prescription, and no vaccination that can cure the effects of PTS better than connecting with fellow Veterans through shared experiences. Stoked On Fishing and Save The Brave to bring awareness to PTSD (Post Traumatic syndrome). In this special episode, we take a group of veterans fishing on the El Dorado out of Long Beach Sportfishing. We catch giant southern California White Sea Bass, Calico Bass, Sheep's Head, and Yellowtail.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing — Fishing with Veterans on the El Dorado
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In June 1941, Leo Wolfson's life took an unexpected turn when he was drafted into the Army. World War II had arrived, and Leo was stationed on the islands of Hawaii only months after the bombing of Pearl Harbor. Tasked with being a soldier and an entertainer, Leo rose to the occasion on both fronts. Leo's wit and humor are intact, and he shares his stories and personal experience in WWII.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - WWII Veteran Leo Wolfson
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe-Gibson County Lake
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Gibson County Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al and Dan Lindner chase chunky mid-summer smallmouth bass in a Midwestern river and discover loads of fun!_
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lake Winnebago has finally frozen, and perch fishing is good! This week, we're in our backyard doing sight fishing with lightning lance! We'll also show off how our guiding business works, so hang onto your hineys!
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Sight Fishing Perch

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | Sight Fishing Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors | Sight Fishing Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors | Sight Fishing Perch

Video.summary: Shea McIntee and his brother Ryan McIntee explore the High Sierra lakes and catch three different trout species.
Video.title: Stoked On Fishing — The High Sierras, Pt. 2

Video.summary: Jim reviews how to build your own bladed jig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building a Bladed Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Being in the Right Place at the Right Time for Huge Bass
Video.title: Episode 1
